### **Events:**
 - **zoom-change** - Dispatched when the zoom level changes (detail: number)
- **node-select** - Dispatched when a node is selected or deselected (detail: { node })
- **node-hover** - Dispatched when a node is hovered (detail: { nodeId })
- **cluster-select** - Dispatched when a cluster is selected or deselected (detail: { clusterId })
- **cluster-hover** - Dispatched when a cluster is hovered (detail: { clusterId })
- **zoom-in** - Dispatched when zoom in is requested via keyboard
- **zoom-out** - Dispatched when zoom out is requested via keyboard
- **zoom-reset** - Dispatched when zoom reset is requested via keyboard

elements.name: xcode-graph-badge
elements.description:
Color-themed badge with pill, rounded, and accent variants
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--badge-bg** - Background color of the badge (computed from color prop) _(default: undefined)_
- **--badge-border** - Border color of the badge (computed from color prop) _(default: undefined)_
- **--badge-color** - Text color of the badge (computed from color prop) _(default: undefined)_
- **--badge-bg-hover** - Background color on hover (computed from color prop) _(default: undefined)_
- **--badge-border-hover** - Border color on hover (computed from color prop) _(default: undefined)_
- **--badge-glow** - Glow color on hover (computed from color prop) _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text to display in the badge

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color for the badge (hex or CSS color)

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
Badge shape variant
- 'pill': Fully rounded (radii-full)
- 'rounded': Small border radius (radii-sm)
- 'accent': Small radius with left accent border

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
Badge size
- 'sm': Smaller text (xs), monospace font
- 'md': Medium text (sm), body font

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Whether the badge has interactive hover states

attributes.name: glow
attributes.description: Whether to show glow effect on hover
